accurate.why: All claims match the bill text or are accurate CRA context (treated as never effective, bar on substantially similar reissuance) confirmed by sources.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; CFTC, Congressional Review Act, and reissuance-bar context are all accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves and nullifies the CFTC voluntary carbon credit derivative guidance under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the CRA (chapter 8 of title 5) mechanism and the specific CFTC guidance being nullified.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the substantially-similar reissuance bar and correctly states the resolution contains no other exceptions.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective date beyond the disapproval itself, which the summary correctly notes.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: the guidance shall have no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Tight with no padding; added CRA context is relevant and brief.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the CFTC, the CRA, Mrs. Bice, and the House Committee on Agriculture.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register cite (89 Fed. Reg. 83378), October 15, 2024, and April 3, 2025 introduction date all match the bill.
